race.comment: PRAWNS ELEVEN (2) stepped up to 1200m last start and returned to winning ways, scoring by 1.6L. Riordan's claim gets him in nicely at the weights and he did jump the $1.50 favourite there. Looks to be trending the right way and this looks well within his grasp. ROLLING RULER (7) comes back out to 1200m on the quick turnaround after a narrow defeat last start over 1000m. He won a similar race here two back and he looks to get every favour from the draw. Can return to winning form. MALLETIER (8) got the job done over this track and trip 21 days ago when winning in this company. Parnham now hops on board third-up into the campaign. Trending the right way and can make his presence felt again. SNOW GOD (9) didn't have the best of luck last start and is better than he showed there. Can bounce back to his best second-up.
